name: Pulmonary surfactant
executiveSummary: Treatment of respiratory distress syndrome in newborns < 1250 g or with evidence of surfactant deficit.
indications:
## Main indications

Treatment of respiratory distress syndrome in newborns < 1250 g or with evidence of surfactant deficit.

> Adjust according to institutional protocol and medical prescription.

pediatrico.dose: Rescue treatment: phospholipids: 4 mL/kg/dose. Second dose according to blood gas parameters. Maximum 4 doses.
pediatrico.notes: Exclusive use by Neonatology specialist. It is a saline dispersion of natural lipids and proteins derived from bovine lungs. Blood reflux from the endotracheal tube has been observed. Store refrigerated.

neonatal.dose: 100–200 mg/kg via endotracheal route; repeat according to NICU protocol.

stability:
## Stability

- Refrigerate; warm to room temperature before instillation.
adverseEffects:
## Adverse effects

Pulmonary hemorrhage, transient bradycardia, decreased oxygen saturation, hypotension, hypertension, tachycardia, feeding intolerance, renal insufficiency, hematuria, thrombocytopenia, seizures.
